name: Jane Doe
title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Experienced software engineer with 8+ years building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Passionate about clean code, developer tooling, and mentoring early-career engineers.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led architecture and delivery of a microservices migration, reducing p99 latency by 40% across core APIs.
Mentored a team of 4 engineers, conducting weekly code reviews and bi-weekly 1:1s.
Designed an internal feature-flag system now used by 12 product teams.
Drove adoption of TypeScript across the frontend monorepo, cutting runtime errors by 30%.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained REST and GraphQL APIs serving 2M+ monthly active users.
Optimized PostgreSQL query performance, reducing average query time from 800ms to 95ms.
Collaborated with design and product to ship a redesigned onboarding flow, improving activation by 22%.

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed full-stack features using React and Node.js for a B2B SaaS platform.
Wrote integration and unit tests, bringing code coverage from 18% to 74%.

projects.name: OpenTrace
projects.description: Open-source distributed tracing library for Node.js with zero-config setup and OpenTelemetry compatibility. 1.2k GitHub stars.

projects.name: QuickForm
projects.description: Headless React form library with built-in validation, 4kb gzipped. Featured in the React Newsletter.
